classification.description: Deposit agreement to secure own liabilities

particulars.description: All such rights to the repayment of the deposit as the company then had under the terms upon which the deposit was made and the provisions contained in the agreement. Account number 7025517. see the mortgage charge document for full details.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever
